title: BDRY - January 9, 2024
summary: Despite winter blues, expectations remain high - The first week of the New Year saw limited action as it relates to Chinese steel demand declines as seasonality kicks in - As winter weather settles in the Northern hemisphere, Our long-term view - The last few years have been characterized by increased geopolitical uncertainty.
